chapters.title: Wave-Particle Duality
chapters.transcript: Double-slit experiment. Photons and electrons behave as both waves and particles. Complementarity.

chapters.title: Schrödinger Equation
chapters.transcript: Time-dependent and time-independent. Wavefunctions, probability density. Particle in a box.

chapters.title: Quantum Operators
chapters.transcript: Observables as Hermitian operators. Eigenvalues and eigenstates. Position and momentum.

chapters.title: Heisenberg Uncertainty Principle
chapters.transcript: Δx Δp ≥ ħ/2. Energy-time uncertainty. Implications for measurement.

chapters.title: Quantum Entanglement
chapters.transcript: Bell states, EPR paradox. Bell's inequality. Quantum teleportation.
